name: susan-mcp
description: Bridge to Susan's department-based agent organization — 218 agents across 15 departments, 10K+ RAG chunks, research pipeline
author: Jake PAI

tools.name: susan_search
tools.description: Search Susan's RAG knowledge base (Voyage AI embeddings, 10K+ chunks across 22 data types)

tools.name: susan_department
tools.description: Route a task to a specific department head for delegation to specialists

department.description: Department name: strategy, product, engineering, languages, infrastructure, quality-security, data-ai, devex, research, growth, content-design, film-production, health-science, behavioral-science, specialized-domains

tools.name: susan_agent
tools.description: Invoke a specific Susan agent by name (bypasses department routing for direct specialist access)

tools.name: susan_foundry
tools.description: Run Susan's capability foundry — capability mapping, team design, maturity scoring

mode.description: Mode: foundry | route | design | status | think | fast

tools.name: susan_research
tools.description: Dispatch research pipeline — multi-source intelligence gathering

sources.description: Sources: web, arxiv, reddit, appstore, papers, skills

tools.name: susan_roster
tools.description: Query the agent roster — list departments, agents, capabilities, or find the right agent for a task
